---
title: "Hajishirzi on Knowledge-Rich General-Purpose NLP @ NAACL 2022"
description: "Hannaneh Hajishirzi at SUKI on building general-purpose, knowledge-rich NLP — Meta-ICL, TK-Instruct, GKP."
author: "synesis"
date: "2022-07-15"
categories: [NLP, knowledge graphs, conference, NAACL]
image: cover.jpg
---

::: {layout-ncol=2}
![SUKI Workshop @ NAACL 2022. Image from [SUKI workshop](https://suki-workshop.github.io/).](cover.jpg)

![Slide from Hajishirzi's talk at the [SUKI workshop](https://suki-workshop.github.io/).](02.jpg)

![Slide from Hajishirzi's talk at the [SUKI workshop](https://suki-workshop.github.io/).](03.jpg)

![Slide from Hajishirzi's talk at the [SUKI workshop](https://suki-workshop.github.io/).](04.jpg)

![Slide from Hajishirzi's talk at the [SUKI workshop](https://suki-workshop.github.io/).](05.jpg)

![Slide from Hajishirzi's talk at the [SUKI workshop](https://suki-workshop.github.io/).](06.jpg)
:::
Professor Hannaneh Hajishirzi (University of Washington, Allen Institute for AI (AI2)) gave an invited talk at SUKI Workshop @ NAACL2022 on building general-purpose and knowledge-rich NLP models.

* Meta-ICL uses meta-training to learn tasks from demonstrations. <https://arxiv.org/abs/2110.15943>
* TK-Instruct uses knowledge from instructions of related tasks. <https://arxiv.org/abs/2204.07705>
* GKP uses prompting to generate knowledge from LLMs. <https://arxiv.org/abs/2110.08387>

SUKI Workshop @ NAACL2022: <https://suki-workshop.github.io/>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_naacl2022-naacl2022-knowledge-activity-6953875199054290944-Ps-O).*
